headline: UDR Q1 FFOA Matches Estimates on Steady Occupancy, Revenues Miss
summary: UDR posts in-line Q1 FFOA as rent gains are offset by rising costs, while buybacks, asset sales and a shift to monthly dividends reshape its 2026 outlook.

raw.headline: UDR Q1 FFOA Matches Estimates on Steady Occupancy, Revenues Miss

headline: INVH Q1 FFO Meets Estimates as Revenues Top on Homebuilding
summary: INVH posts in-line Q1 FFO as revenues jump 8.8% on rental growth and new homebuilding income, offset by rising expenses and mixed leasing trends.

raw.headline: INVH Q1 FFO Meets Estimates as Revenues Top on Homebuilding
raw.summary: INVH posts in-line Q1 FFO as revenues jump 8.8% on rental growth and new homebuilding income, offset by rising expenses and mixed leasing trends.

headline: MAA Q1 FFO Tops Estimates, Revenues Dip, Occupancy Declines
summary: MAA beats Q1 FFO estimates despite NOI pressure and softer rents, as leasing trends stabilize, and development, buybacks and capital plans stay on track.

raw.headline: MAA Q1 FFO Tops Estimates, Revenues Dip, Occupancy Declines
raw.summary: MAA beats Q1 FFO estimates despite NOI pressure and softer rents, as leasing trends stabilize, and development, buybacks and capital plans stay on track.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Essex Property Trust, Raises Price Target to $288
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Brad Heffern   maintains Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $282 to $288.
